sentences.translation: Došao je mjesec ramazan i muslimani su se obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: The month of Ramadan came and the Muslims were happy.

sentences.arabic: أَمْسَكَ الصَّائِمُونَ عَنِ الطَّعَامِ وَالشَّرَابِ مِنَ الصُّبْحِ.
sentences.translation: Postači su se suzdržali od hrane i pića od sabaha.
sentences.translationEn: The fasting people abstained from food and drink from dawn.

sentences.arabic: قَضَوُا النَّهَارَ فِي الذِّكْرِ وَالدُّعَاءِ وَالصَّبْرِ.
sentences.translation: Dan su proveli u zikru, dovi i strpljenju.
sentences.translationEn: They spent the day in remembrance, supplication, and patience.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ سَمِعُوا الْأَذَانَ فَرِحُوا وَأَفْطَرُوا بِالتَّمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Kad su čuli ezan obradovali su se i iftarili hurmama.
sentences.translationEn: When they heard the adhan they were happy and broke fast with dates.
